heading: Administrative Committee of the Federal Register; establishment and composition; powers and duties
label: 1506 Administrative Committee of the Federal Register; establishment and composition; powers and duties
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on 44 U.S. Code, 1964 ed., §§ 306, 391 (part) (, ; , title I, § 104, ).July 26, 1935, ch. 417, § 649 Stat. 501June 30, 1949, ch. 28863 Stat. 381This section incorporates only the last sentence from former section 391(b). The remainder of that section will be found in sections 2102, 2301, 2501, and 2902 of the revision.

children.text: The documents which shall be authorized under section 1505(b) to be published in the Federal Register.
The manner and form in which the Federal Register shall be published.
The manner and form in which agencies submit documents for publication in the Federal Register and special editions of the Federal Register.

Subject to subsection (b), the manner of distribution to Members of Congress, officers and employees of the United States, or Federal agency, for official use, and the number which shall be available for distribution to the public.
The prices to be charged for individual copies of, and subscriptions to, the Federal Register and any reprints and bound volumes of it.
The manner and form by which the Federal Register may receive information and comments from the public, if practicable and efficient.
Special editions of the Federal Register.

children.heading: Restrictions on Distribution of Free Printed Copies to Members of Congress and Officers and Employees of the United States.—
children.label: b Restrictions on Distribution of Free Printed Copies to Members of Congress and Officers and Employees of the United States.—

children.heading: .—Prohibiting subscription to printed copies without request
children.label: 1 .—Prohibiting subscription to printed copies without request
A
children.text: the Member or office requests a printed copy of a specific issue of the Federal Register; or

children.label: B
children.text: during that year or during the previous year, the Member or office requested a subscription to printed copies of the Federal Register for that year, as described in paragraph (2).

children.label: A
children.text: provisions regarding notifications to offices of Members of Congress and other offices of the United States of the restrictions of paragraph (1);

children.label: B
children.text: provisions describing the process by which Members and other offices may request a specific issue of the Federal Register for purposes of paragraph (1)(A); and

children.label: C
children.text: provisions describing the process by which Members and other offices may request a subscription to the Federal Register for purposes of paragraph (1)(B), except that such regulations shall limit the period for such a subscription to not longer than 1 year.
